message:
fix: clean up orphaned tmux sessions in TestVerifyStartupNudgeDelivery_IdleAgent (gt-mesu)

Kill any pre-existing tmux session with the test name before creating
a new one. Previous test runs that were interrupted (e.g., SIGKILL,
context limit) leave orphaned sessions on the gt-no-town-socket tmux
server, causing subsequent runs to fail with "session already exists".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
